name: Polenta Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Follow the package instructions to cook the polenta until it is firm and creamy.
2. While the polenta is cooking, chop up vegetables: red pepper, green pepper, yellow pepper, onion, and mushrooms.
3. Pour the cooked polenta into a pyrex pan or baking dish, spreading it evenly.
4. Spread tomato sauce over the polenta.
5. Add the chopped vegetables on top of the sauce.
6. Sprinkle shredded mozzarella cheese (if using) over the toppings.
7. Place the pan in a preheated oven and bake until the polenta is golden brown and crispy around the edges, about 30-40 minutes.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before slicing and serving.
Enjoy your Polenta Pizza!
